data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for multi-language support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the multi-language support feature, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for multi-language support, yet there is no supporting evidence to demonstrate that this feature is implemented or operational. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of multi-language support.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multi-language support requirement.
